consumerTone: plain English; educational organ-system and complex-condition genetics context only; no diagnosis, personal risk estimate, symptom inference, lab/imaging/vital/organ-function inference, severity, prognosis, screening, prevention, testing, treatment, medication, supplement, diet, exercise, clearance, emergency, all-clear, or clinical actionability claims

missingInputPolicy: Report unavailable blood trait model calibration, CBC and lab values, blood group confirmation, bleeding or clotting history, transfusion context, donation context, pregnancy compatibility context, clinical diagnosis, treatment context, and clinician review explicitly; do not infer diagnosis, lab values, blood type, compatibility, personal risk, treatment, testing, diet, supplement, or actionability from sample table labels.
